subcodes.first_line: The Divine Book, in most melodious tones, maketh mention of the chosen ones in the Ridván of the All-Merciful's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهی بصوت بسیار ملیحی در رضوان محبت رحمانی اولیا را ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for teaching, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
